# be


```text
usage: be [-h] [which]

```

Enable the breakpoint with the specified index.
### Positional arguments

|Positional Argument|Help|
| :--- | :--- |
|which|Index of the breakpoint to enable. (default: '*')|

### Optional arguments

|Short|Long|Help|
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
|-h|--help|show this help message and exit|
